method: Read-only browser navigation; no authentication, submission, consent decision, or mutation.

directory_fixture_listing.evidence: The directory rendered its search controls and the PCD Fixture Soccer Summer Camp listing.

fixture_detail_route.evidence: The fixture detail route rendered one matching page heading.

fixture_detail_320px_reflow.evidence: documentElement scrollWidth and clientWidth were both 305; body scrollWidth and clientWidth were both 305.

keyboard_activation.evidence: The fixture listing link received focus, but Enter did not navigate while the analytics-consent dialog remained pending. No consent choice was made during this read-only check.

conclusion: This supplements, but does not replace, full keyboard, screen-reader, touch, constrained-network, form, subscription, and payment journey evidence.
